title: AI Visibility Engine
html:
AI Visibility Engine

Yahir's product-frame for Rankett: a system that measures, tracks, and improves how visible a brand is in AI-assistant responses across ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, Grok, DeepSeek, and Google AI Overviews. The category replaces traditional SEO's 10-blue-link optimization with prompt-response optimization: prompts are the new keywords, share-of-voice in answers is the new ranking, the audit-fix-rescore loop happens in days instead of months. The full operational specification lives in 2026 01 07 rankett meetup prep guide (the 25KB GTM bible) and the strategic framing in 2026 01 13 rankett com.

The lineage is older than the name. 2023 05 13 ideas list (May 2023) carries the line "So ai agency company" — 2.5 years before Rankett launches as exactly this. Yahir had the agency idea in 2023; he just hadn't found the AI-search wedge yet. The same 2023 dump also has "USE GPT BUILDER TO CREATE A GPT WRAPPER APPLICATION / -big time fleece and the noobs unfortunately wouldn't know..." — the cynical-but-honest counterweight to his eventual Rankett product positioning. He knew the wrapper economy was shallow, then shipped a value-add anyway.

The intermediate step appears in 2025 04 27 screenshot 2025 04 27 at 7 40 38 pm 56e50e24 — the Jain biometrics survey screenshot where Yahir flags the "semi-automatic" identification framing. System narrows the candidates, human decides. The structural insight is that AI visibility is the same architecture: the AI surfaces the brand, the agency client closes the deal. Not a fully-automated black box; not a manual SEO consultancy. The middle path. Same shape as biometric negative-recognition.

The mature articulation in 2026 01 07 rankett meetup prep guide crystallizes the engine as four bundled capabilities: (1) Visibility score (0–100) as the central metric — the share of voice line in 2026 01 13 rankett com — "fix it so that we have the 'Share of voice' section. more of like a central score"; (2) Per-platform breakdown across the AI-assistant set; (3) Gap analysis identifying where the brand is invisible; (4) Technical implementations — schema markup for AI, llm.txt, directory management across 50+ sites — auto-refresh every 10 days, monthly PDF reports. Standardized fulfillment, no custom work per agency. "Product, not a dev shop." Bundled inside ghost white label zero-Rankett-branding and the 60 day activation rule — both of which are downstream of the AI Visibility Engine being a standardized engine, not a bespoke service.

The deeper bet under the engine is the asking the right question thesis. If the next-best-skill is asking the right question, then the next-best-product is the one that helps brands rank against the questions humans now ask AI assistants. AI visibility is the operationalization of that bet at category level.
